title: Vegan Canadian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with noodles and Canadian vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the bell peppers and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the noodles and cook until heated through.
Stir in the fish-free sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
